data.title: Infobell IT Solutions Announces Strategic Collaboration with AMD to Accelerate Advanced AI Innovation
data.description: A partnership has been forged between Infobell IT Solutions, a prominent provider of enterprise technology services, and AMD in San Francisco. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for both companies as they come together to enhance their offerings in the field of artificial intelligence.

data.title: Vultr Scales Next-Generation AI Infrastructure with AMD Helios Rackscale Solution Powered by AMD Instinct™ MI455X GPUs
data.description: In San Francisco, Vultr, the world's largest privately held cloud infrastructure company, revealed its pioneering move as one of the earliest cloud providers to introduce the latest AMD Instinct™ MI455X GPU and endorse the AMD Helios rackscale solution at AMD Advancing AI. Pre-orders for these offerings will be accessible in Q4, targeting customers seeking advanced capabilities for high-memory, rackscale-accelerated compute tasks such as training, inference, fine-tuning, agentic AI, and HPC. This step aligns with the increasing trend of customers transitioning from AI experimentation to implementation.

data.title: Liqid Unveils Massive Scale-Up AI Platform Powered by AMD Instinct™ MI350P GPUs
data.description: In Westminster, Colorado, Liqid®, a leading provider of software-defined memory and GPU pooling infrastructure, has unveiled a new partnership with AMD. This collaboration focuses on leveraging the AMD Instinct™ MI350P GPUs to create cutting-edge AI infrastructure solutions. By combining Liqid's GPU pooling technology with AMD's PCIe-based Instinct GPUs, enterprise and cloud clients can access scalable and efficient AI infrastructure solutions. This collaboration aims to provide customers with the ability to enhance their AI capabilities without the need to completely overhaul their existing data centers.

data.title: D.C. PASSES THE STRONGEST CONSUMER PROTECTIONS LAWS FOR CONCERT FANS IN THE NATION
data.description: A new legislation called the RESALE Act has been implemented, which includes a 10% cap on resale prices and prohibits speculative ticket sales. Additionally, it enhances accountability for professional resellers and provides extensive consumer protections for fans of live entertainment in the District. This initiative aims to address issues in the ticket resale market and ensure fair practices. The legislation was announced on July 23, 2026 in Washington. As part of this development, I.M.P. has also expressed support for the new regulations.

data.title: Wingstop Expands Wing Day into Wing Week, Kicking Off a Broader $1 Million in Fan Experiences and Giveaways
data.description: Celebrate Wingstop Wing Day with free wings offered alongside eligible purchases, along with exclusive Club Wingstop rewards and live music experiences. Beginning July 23, 2026, Wingstop is enhancing the event, providing fans with an unrivaled week of flavor. This marks the first occurrence of such an initiative by the brand.

data.title: Canadian General Investments, Limited Declares Dividend on Common Shares
data.description: In Toronto, Canada on July 23, 2026, Canadian General Investments, Limited, also known as CGI, announced a quarterly dividend of $0.31 per share. This dividend will be paid on September 15, 2026, to common shareholders who are recorded as such by the close of business on August 31, 2026. It is important to note that this dividend is classified as a capital gains dividend according to the Income Tax Act in Canada. The company's stock is traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol CGI and on the London Stock Exchange under the same abbreviation.

data.title: Lula's Brazil race odds rise to 60.5% after 11pp surge. A Georgia poll predicts Ossoff leads Collins in Senate race 2026.
data.description: In a recent poll conducted by AARP for the 2026 Senate race in Georgia, Democrat Jon Ossoff is in the lead with numbers showing him ahead of Republican Mike Collins. This survey aligns with other recent polls that have also indicated Ossoff leading in the race. The poll results suggest a favorable position for Ossoff as the leading candidate in the upcoming Senate race in Georgia.

data.title: Polymarket predicts 73% chance of July Fed hold amid high volatility. Learn why some are still waiting for $1,000 linked to a "Trump account".
data.description: An informative article delves into the reasons behind delays in receiving a pledged "free $1,000" linked to a "Trump account", outlining the steps to take if the payment has not yet been received. For further details, read the complete article.

data.title: mimik Operationalizes Agentic AI on the AMD Ryzen™ AI Embedded X100 Series
data.description: In Oakland, California, mimik has implemented agentic AI on the AMD Ryzen AI Embedded X100 Series using mimOE Embedded Edition.

data.title: TensorWave Powers Frontier AI Growth for Cloud Customers with AMD Helios Rackscale Solution
data.description: In Las Vegas, TensorWave, the all-AMD AI cloud focused on high-performance, memory-intensive tasks, revealed its adoption of the AMD Helios rackscale solution powered by AMD Instinct™ MI455X GPUs. This move is aimed at enhancing its infrastructure to handle frontier-scale inference and training workloads. The 72-GPU AMD Helios rackscale solution consists of AMD Instinct GPUs, 6th Gen AMD EPYC™ CPUs, AMD Pensando™ networking, and AMD ROCm™ software, all integrated into a unified, open rack-scale platform.

data.title: T-REX to Launch First-Ever U.S. 2X Inverse DRAM ETF (RAMZ) on July 28
data.description: In Miami, a new ETF called RAMZ is set to launch on July 28, 2026, by T-REX, a joint venture involving REX Shares and Tuttle Capital Management. This ETF will be the first -2x Inverse ETF in the U.S. tied to the Roundhill Memory ETF (Ticker: DRAM). The T-REX has a track record of introducing innovative exposures to the market, with RAMZ being their latest addition following the first 2x and -2x ETFs on Tesla (TSLT) and Nvidia (NVDX). RAMZ aims to provide investors with a unique investment opportunity within the memory sector.

data.title: BioBuilder Educational Foundation Awarded $1 Million “Gamechanger” Grant from Massachusetts Life Sciences Center
data.description: Boston's BioBuilder Educational Foundation, a nonprofit promoting biotechnology education, has secured a "Gamechanger" grant of $1,000,000 from the Massachusetts Life Sciences Center (MLSC). The MLSC, the state’s life sciences economic development agency, and the Healey-Driscoll Administration jointly announced $12.3 million funding for projects like this. The foundation aims to enhance hands-on biotech education for students nationwide.

data.title: Tensormesh and AMD Collaborate to Empower Fewer GPUs to Serve More Models
data.description: San Francisco-based Tensormesh has partnered with AMD to enhance caching-accelerated inference optimization for enterprise AI. The collaboration will integrate Tensormesh's KV cache solution with AMD's virtual memory technology, enabling the serving of more models on fewer GPUs. This partnership aims to maintain high KV cache hit rates and throughput, especially when dealing with oversubscribed high-bandwidth memory (HBM). Tensormesh is leveraging AMD's GPU technology and Live Cont to achieve these goals.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Pounded As Oil Surges; Honeywell Crosses Trendline (Live Coverage)
data.description: The price of oil surged to over $92 per barrel, causing concerns in the market. However, there was positive movement from Micron and other chip equipment companies, which experienced a rally. The Nasdaq saw a significant decline due to the oil price increase. In related news, Honeywell surpassed a key trendline. This live coverage highlights the latest updates on the stock market.

data.title: Croatia's Grid Operator Approves Power Supply Blueprint for Pantheon AI's 1 GW Data Center
data.description: In Croatia, Pantheon Atlas LLC has received approval from the national transmission system operator, HOPS, for a blueprint to supply a planned 1 GW hyperscale AI data center in Topusko. This approval also includes open grid access for over 5 GW of new renewable capacity currently facing bottlenecks in the country. The technical and regulatory feasibility of providing electricity at scale for this project has been confirmed by HOPS, marking a significant milestone towards construction.
